z80emu by Lin Ke-Fong
Copyright (c) 2012-2017 Lin Ke-Fong

"This code is free, do whatever you want with it."

Upstream: https://github.com/anotherlin/z80emu

Files in this directory are an unmodified vendor copy of z80emu, except for
this LICENSE.txt note. The user-customizable z80user.h lives in ../../src/
where it interfaces the emulator with the ZX Spectrum memory bus.
